name: Liquid Mirror - Charlie Mcay
description:
This is for those that prefer Charlie over Charles (aka me *cough* *cough*)

The scenario that this bot will be made for is specifically for *Charlie's route* and _maybe_ a little bit of the mix and match route where Charles takes over for a second.

THIS BOT IS HEAVILY ON *BETA* IT IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE FREQUENTLY.

im making it public now because i would LOVE to hear about your feedback to make it as accurate as possible AND grab any errors at the throat early on.
creator: Cheshirewolf56
